name: com.midmanstudio.utilities
description: Core runtime utilities for Unity 2022.3+. Includes tick dispatcher, zero-alloc tick delay, logger, object/particle pools, trail renderer pool, singletons, observable values, event bus, audio manager, timers, library system, scene management, UI state system, and a suite of editor tools. No game-specific dependencies — designed as a foundation for all MidManStudio packages.
